'''√l-dh-v''' ('''kaladhav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:label|label]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:label|label]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √l-dh-v
|-
! Lemma
| kaladhav
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thiladhav || jiladhav || shiladhav || kiladhav
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuladhav || jujuladhav || shushuladhav || kukuladhav
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuladhav || juladhav || shuladhav || kuladhav
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuladhav || juladhav || shuladhav || kuladhav
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theladhav || jeladhav || sheladhav || keladhav
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thotholadhav || jojoladhav || shosholadhav || kokoladhav
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tholadhav || joladhav || sholadhav || koladhav
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tholadhav || joladhav || sholadhav || koladhav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ladhav || ladhav || ladhav || ladhav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ladhav || ladhav || ladhav || ladhav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ladhav || ladhav || ladhav || ladhav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ladhav || ladhav || ladhav || ladhav
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæladhav || jæladhav || shæladhav || kæladhav
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathaladhav || jajaladhav || shashaladhav || kakaladhav
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thaladhav || jaladhav || shaladhav || kaladhav
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thaladhav || jaladhav || shaladhav || kaladhav
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shaladhav
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshaladhav
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishaladhav
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shaladhavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshaladhavnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishaladhavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shaladhavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshaladhavnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishaladhavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shaladhavro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshaladhavnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishaladhavro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shaladhavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshaladhavnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishaladhavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shaladhavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshaladhavnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishaladhavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shaladhavng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshaladhavnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishaladhavng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shaladhavya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshaladhavnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishaladhavya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shaladhavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshaladhavnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishaladhavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shaladhavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshaladhavnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishaladhavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shaladhavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshaladhavnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishaladhavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shaladhavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshaladhavnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishaladhavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shaladhavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshaladhavnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishaladhavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shaladhavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshaladhavnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishaladhavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shaladhavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshaladhavnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishaladhavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shaladhavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshaladhavnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishaladhavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shaladhavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshaladhavnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishaladhavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shaladhavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshaladhavnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishaladhavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shaladhavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshaladhavnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishaladhavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shaladhavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshaladhavnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishaladhavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shaladhavmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshaladhavnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishaladhavmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
